modal.title: Alarm for {{name}}
modal.onceHint: Triggers once when the condition is met and stops.
modal.continuousHint: Notifies every time the condition is met (30min cooldown).
modal.notePlaceholder: e.g. My target sell price — appended to the alarm email

list.empty: No alarms yet. Use the "Set Alarm" button on any asset detail page.
